introductionSomali: Unit-kan waa cashar luqadeed oo baraya xubnaha jirka, dareenka, calaamadaha fudud, ballamaha, clinic iyo pharmacy vocabulary, should, have to, tilmaamo, notices iyo fariimo. Ma aha diagnosis ama adeeg caafimaad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xubnaha jirka waxaa lagu baranayaa English A2 oo fudud, ammaan ah, kuna kooban luqad-barasho; casharku ma bixiyo diagnosis ama daaweyn qofeed.
learningObjectives: Faham erayada iyo weedhaha muhiimka ah ee Xubnaha jirka.
Adeegso qaababka grammar-ka A2 ee xaalad tusaale ah.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoon bixin xog caafimaad oo gaar ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Have to and don’t have to
grammar.titleSomali: Waajibaadka — Have To iyo Don’t Have To
grammar.explanationSomali: Have/has to waa waajib. Don’t/doesn’t have to waa khasab ma aha; macnihiisu ma aha mamnuuc.
grammar.rule: Have/has to waa waajib. Don’t/doesn’t have to waa khasab ma aha; macnihiisu ma aha mamnuuc.
grammar.sentenceStructure: S + have/has to + base; S + don’t/doesn’t have to + base.

examples.english: Dear Hassan, this message confirms your clinic appointment for Tuesday at 10:00 in the morning. Yesterday, you called reception because you have a school exam at that time. The receptionist checked the schedule and offered a new appointment on Wednesday at 11:30. You accepted the new time and asked what you should bring. Please arrive ten minutes early and bring your identification and appointment card. When you enter the clinic, go to reception and give your name. Then wait in the waiting room until the nurse calls you. If Wednesday at 11:30 is no longer suitable, call the clinic again before the appointment. You do not have to explain private health information in your message. You can simply say that you need another time. This email is only an example for learning appointment language. It does not give a diagnosis, medicine advice, or treatment instructions. Please reply with a short confirmation, such as: “Thank you. Wednesday at 11:30 is suitable for me. I will arrive early.”
examples.somali: Fariintani waxay sharxaysaa ballan clinic oo tusaale ah, isbeddel waqtiga, waxa la soo qaadanayo iyo fariin maqnaansho oo edeb leh.

grammar.explanationSomali: Isticmaal have/has + symptom, should + base verb, he/she + has to, iyo don’t have to + base verb.
grammar.rule: Isticmaal have/has + symptom, should + base verb, he/she + has to, iyo don’t have to + base verb.
grammar.sentenceStructure: S + have/has; S + should + base; S + have/has to + base.
